notes: Mock baseline uses deterministic template scores; included only as an engineering baseline.
Direct SimOPA example scoring with released checkpoint.
Endpoint returns Top 3 but scores the full 12-candidate SimOPA prior pool.

Scores OPA labeled candidate plus generated prior pool for each case.
Each candidate is scored with object mask, bbox mask, and blank mask.
No model inference; applies temperature scaling and IoU dedup on existing scores.

Expanded validation with 25 positive and 25 negative OPA cases.
Perturbs mask shape, candidate position, and candidate scale on five representative cases.
Compares full 13-candidate SimOPA ranking with a reduced candidate-budget lite mode.
Keeps one SimOPA model worker alive and compares it with per-case subprocess loading.
